cases.name: domestic-malt-series-brand-fanciful-pun
cases.description: Series/product-line brand name that is NOT the brewery (brewery is Cedar & Stone Brewing, but the brand is the printed series line 'Wandering Roots Series'). Tests that brand_name is the series, brewery goes into domestic_name_address, and a punny fanciful name ('Hazy Days Ahead') is separated from the IPA style. Also stacked multi-line brand block. Full government warning present.

cases.name: domestic-malt-color-pun-fanciful-stacked-brand
cases.description: Fanciful name with a color word that must be kept whole and NOT converted into a class/type ('Midnight Red' is the fanciful name; class/type is the printed 'Amber Lager'). Brand name spans two stacked lines that must be combined ('Iron Gate Brewworks'). The prominent style word 'LAGER' is decorative and must not become the brand. Bottler name/address with a 'Brewed by' lead phrase that must be stripped. No warning printed (tests government_warning = '').

cases.name: domestic-malt-plain-brand-style-no-fanciful
cases.description: Plain brand + class/type with NO fanciful name (fanciful_name must be ''). The prominent 'IPA' style word must NOT be treated as the brand; brand is 'Granite Peak Brewing Company' and class/type is the spelled-out 'India Pale Ale'. Name/address is a single company with city/state and no lead phrase (the brewery IS the brand here). Tests that no creative name is invented and IPA stays out of brand and fanciful.

expected.domestic_name_address: Granite Peak Brewing Company, Denver, Colorado

cases.name: imported-beer-style-front-importer-not-brand
cases.description: Hard separation: the front shows a beer style (HEFEWEIZEN) prominently with the brand series name, while a separate 'Imported by' company that is NOT the brand appears below. Tests that the style is not treated as brand, the importer (not brand) goes to importer_name_address, class_type strips leading 'Imported', and 'Brewed in Germany' yields just GERMANY. fanciful_name must be '' because Hefeweizen is a style, not a fanciful name.

cases.name: stacked-numeric-brand-resolved-from-back-label-imported
